objective: Analyze the full AgentOps eval suite and identify what to improve, refactor, merge, or kill.
validation_commands: cd cli && env -u AGENTOPS_RPI_RUNTIME go test ./cmd/ao ./internal/eval

tracker_health.reason: bd ready and bd list probes succeeded; epic ag-v29 and six child issues were created

done_criteria: Artifact-only canaries are kept, refactored, merged, or removed with replacement proof
Fast and full deterministic eval lanes are distinct
RPI and skill-change scorecards use behavioral fixtures
Live runtime and holdout lanes remain opt-in and advisory until calibrated

test_levels.rationale: The plan touches schemas/contracts (L0), Go runner and CLI behavior (L1), script/CI integration and suite execution (L2), and broad product canary behavior where a component-level full deterministic run is appropriate (L3).
